'''√h-p-ng''' ('''kahapang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lactoferment|lactoferment]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lactoferment|lactoferment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-p-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kahapang
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thihapang || jihapang || shihapang || kihapang
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuhapang || jujuhapang || shushuhapang || kukuhapang
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuhapang || juhapang || shuhapang || kuhapang
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuhapang || juhapang || shuhapang || kuhapang
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thehapang || jehapang || shehapang || kehapang
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothohapang || jojohapang || shoshohapang || kokohapang
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thohapang || johapang || shohapang || kohapang
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thohapang || johapang || shohapang || kohapang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hapang || hapang || hapang || hapang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hapang || hapang || hapang || hapang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hapang || hapang || hapang || hapang
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hapang || hapang || hapang || hapang
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæhapang || jæhapang || shæhapang || kæhapang
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathahapang || jajahapang || shashahapang || kakahapang
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thahapang || jahapang || shahapang || kahapang
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thahapang || jahapang || shahapang || kahapang
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shahapang
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshahapang
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishahapang
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shahapangnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshahapangnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishahapangnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shahapangshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshahapangnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishahapangshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shahapangro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshahapangnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishahapangro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shahapangmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshahapangnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishahapangmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shahapangsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshahapangnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishahapangsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shahapangng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshahapangnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishahapangng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shahapangya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshahapangnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishahapangya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shahapangyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshahapangnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishahapangyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shahapangnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshahapangnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishahapangnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shahapangnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahapangnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahapangnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shahapangnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshahapangnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahapangnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shahapangshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshahapangnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishahapangshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shahapangshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahapangnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahapangshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shahapangshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshahapangnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahapangshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shahapangronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshahapangnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishahapangronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shahapangroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshahapangnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishahapangroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shahapangromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshahapangnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahapangromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shahapangmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshahapangnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishahapangmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shahapangmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshahapangnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishahapangmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shahapangmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahapangnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahapangmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
